certified_tests.note: lm_eval loglikelihood path is not supported on chat completions.
Current Ollama completions compatibility rejects the lm_eval prompt array shape for loglikelihood tasks.
ModuleNotFoundError: Attempted to use an API model, but the required packages ['tenacity'] are not installed. Please install these via `pip install lm-eval[api]` or `pip install -e ."[api]"`
